chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4282 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on CMA No.22689/15 2. For order on CMA No.18760/15 3.
